description: Modular operations platform for Willow Center therapy practice. React + Vite + Google Sheets API. Read CLAUDE.md before starting any story.

userStories.title: Project scaffold
userStories.description: Initialize the Vite + React project with all dependencies installed and a passing build.
acceptanceCriteria: Vite + React 18 project created
Dependencies installed: @react-oauth/google, @dnd-kit/core, @dnd-kit/sortable, lucide-react, recharts
Tailwind CSS loaded via CDN in index.html
Sora and IBM Plex Mono loaded from Google Fonts in index.html
CSS custom properties defined in index.css matching design system colors in CLAUDE.md
.env.example created with all 4 required env vars documented
vercel.json created with SPA routing (all routes -> index.html)
.gitignore includes .env
npm run build passes with no errors

userStories.title: App shell and routing
userStories.description: App shell with sidebar, top bar, and basic routing between modules. No auth yet — use a mock user for now.
acceptanceCriteria: App renders with sidebar (220px) and main content area
Sidebar matches spec in CLAUDE.md exactly: logo area, module nav, Reports stub, Admin section, user footer
Sidebar background #161D2E, active item #2A7A65
Onboarding is the default active module
Revenue Cycle, Voicemail, Command Center show 'Phase 2' label and toast on click
Reports shows 'Round 2' label
Top bar renders with placeholder title, view switcher (Queue/Kanban/My Tasks), search input, Add Client button
Toast system works globally (success and error variants)
npm run build passes

userStories.title: Google OAuth login page
userStories.description: Login page with Google OAuth, domain restriction, and logo animation.
acceptanceCriteria: If user is not authenticated, show login page (not the app shell)
Login page shows Willow Center logo with botanical leaf particle entrance animation
App name 'Willow Ops' fades up beneath logo after animation completes
'Sign in with Google' button centered below name
After login, validate hd claim matches VITE_ALLOWED_DOMAIN — reject with error toast if not
OAuth access token stored in React context and available to all components
User name and email stored in context for display in sidebar
Logout button in sidebar clears context and returns to login page
npm run build passes

userStories.title: Google Sheets service layer — read
userStories.description: All Google Sheets read functions in src/services/sheets.js. Uses mock data fallback when sheet IDs not configured.
acceptanceCriteria: sheets.js exports: getOnboardingClients(token), getStaff(token), getConfig(token), getBillingRows(token)
getOnboardingClients reads 'Need to Check' tab, maps rows to client objects using header row for column positions (not hardcoded column indices)

Client object shape: id, dateAdded, staffInitials, clientName, clinician, firstAppt, custodyAgreement, gfeSent, paperworkComplete, insuranceCard, primaryInsurance, secondaryInsurance, memberId, dob, employer, verified, notes, spNoteAdded, insuranceUpdated, outreachAttempts (array of {date, method}), urgentOverride, archiveReason, archiveDate, clinicianHistory
getStaff reads 'Staff' tab (creates tab with headers if missing)
getConfig reads 'Config' tab (creates with defaults if missing)
Default config values match CLAUDE.md spec
All functions accept accessToken as first param
npm run build passes

userStories.title: Google Sheets service layer — write
userStories.description: All Google Sheets write functions. Every write appends to Audit_Log.
acceptanceCriteria: sheets.js exports write functions: updateClientField(token, clientId, field, value), appendOutreachAttempt(token, clientId, method, context, staffEmail), appendNote(token, clientId, note, staffInitials), moveClientToArchive(token, clientId, reason, staffEmail), reactivateClient(token, clientId, staffEmail), moveClientToCompleted(token, clientId), addClient(token, clientData), addStaff(token, staffData), deactivateStaff(token, staffInitials), updateConfig(token, key, value), createTask(token, taskData), updateTask(token, taskId, field, value), bulkReassignTasks(token, fromInitials, toInitials)
updateClientField finds the row by clientId (using Client Name + Date Added as composite key), updates the correct column
appendOutreachAttempt: attempts 1-5 go to Date_Attempt_N / Method_Attempt_N columns; attempt 6+ appends new row to Outreach_Log tab
moveClientToArchive: copies row to Cancellation [current year] tab, deletes from Need to Check, writes archive fields
reactivateClient: copies row back to Need to Check, clears archive fields, writes reactivated_date and reactivated_by
Every write function appends a row to Audit_Log tab after success
Audit_Log tab created with headers if missing
npm run build passes

userStories.title: Status and progress utility functions
userStories.description: Pure utility functions for deriving status, calculating progress, and date helpers.
acceptanceCriteria: src/utils/status.js exports deriveStatus(client, config) — returns 'urgent' | 'needs-paperwork' | 'pending-insurance' | 'ready' | 'archived'
Status derivation logic matches CLAUDE.md exactly
src/utils/progress.js exports calcProgress(client) — returns {pct: number, requiredItems: array, completedItems: array}
Progress calculation uses visibility rules from CLAUDE.md checklist table
src/utils/dates.js exports: daysBetween(a, b), isMinor(dob), daysUntil18(dob), formatApptDate(dateStr)
isMinor returns null (unknown) when DOB is blank/n/a
npm run build passes

userStories.title: Onboarding queue — KPI cards and filter chips
userStories.description: Top strip of KPI cards and filter chips for the queue view.
acceptanceCriteria: 4 KPI cards: Active Queue, Urgent, Pending Insurance, Appts This Week
Counts derived from client data using deriveStatus and dates utilities
Urgent card has red left border (#E24B4A) and red number
Clicking a KPI card activates the corresponding filter chip
Filter chips: All | Urgent | Pending Insurance | Needs Paperwork | Ready
Active chip has #2A7A65 background and white text
Filter chips update the visible rows in the queue table
npm run build passes

userStories.title: Onboarding queue — client table
userStories.description: The main client table in queue view with all columns, sorting, and search.
acceptanceCriteria: Table columns: Client Name | Clinician | First Appt | Progress | Insurance | Status | Actions
Client Name: colored urgency dot + name text; name is RED (#C94040) only when status = urgent
First Appt: IBM Plex Mono font; red if ≤2 days, amber if ≤7 days, gray otherwise
Progress: mini bar (4px height) + percentage; bar color follows thresholds in CLAUDE.md
Insurance: 'Verified' green badge | 'Self Pay' gray badge | carrier name blue badge (pending)
Status: colored badge matching status colors in CLAUDE.md
Actions: only Log Outreach icon button (no View button — row click opens drawer)
Clicking any row opens the client drawer
All columns sortable by clicking header; sort direction indicator shown
Default sort: urgent first, then appt date ascending
Search input filters by client name AND clinician name in real time
npm run build passes

userStories.title: Client drawer — shell, header, and progress bar
userStories.description: The slide-in client drawer shell with animated progress bar and tab navigation.
acceptanceCriteria: Drawer slides in from right (200ms ease) when a client row is clicked
Background overlay dims the main content
Header: client name, status badge, clinician, staff assigned (editable dropdown sourced from Staff tab), date added
Archive button in header (opens confirmation modal)
Staff assigned dropdown updates the sheet on selection
Progress bar animates from 0% to actual value (ease-out 600ms) on drawer open
Progress number counts up from 0 to actual value in sync with bar
Animation re-triggers every time a checklist item is toggled
Bar color: red <50%, amber 50-79%, green ≥80%
Stage labels below bar: Scheduled → Paperwork → Insurance → Verified → Ready
Done stages: green; current stage: #2A7A65 with glow pip; future: gray
Age-18 banner shown above tabs when client turns 18 within 90 days (amber, dismissable)
Four tabs: Checklist | Outreach | Notes | Details
Close button (X) closes drawer
npm run build passes

userStories.title: Client drawer — checklist tab
userStories.description: Interactive checklist with visibility rules, sheet writes, and progress updates.
acceptanceCriteria: Renders checklist items per visibility rules in CLAUDE.md
Each item: toggle checkbox, label, Required/Optional tag
Toggling an item writes to the corresponding column in the sheet immediately
Toggling re-triggers the progress bar animation
When all required items are complete, client status updates to 'ready' and writes to sheet
Appointment info section below checklist: first appt date/time, clinician, days until appt (countdown)
Self-pay: items 2 and 3 hidden, item 5 shown
Minor: item 4 shown (per CLAUDE.md minor detection logic)
npm run build passes

userStories.title: Client drawer — outreach tab
userStories.description: Outreach timeline and log attempt panel.
acceptanceCriteria: Timeline shows all outreach attempts: date, method badge, staff initials, context note
Visual connector line between timeline entries
Total attempt count shown (no '5 attempt' cap)
Log attempt panel: optional free-text context field + method buttons
Method buttons sourced from Config tab 'outreach_methods' key (not hardcoded)
Default methods: SP Reminders | Google Text | LVM | EMW | Final Reminder
Clicking a method button saves: timestamp + method + context + staff email to sheet
Attempts 1-5: write to Date_Attempt_N / Method_Attempt_N in Need to Check
Attempts 6+: append row to Outreach_Log tab
Context note always written to Outreach_Log
Toast confirms after each log
npm run build passes

userStories.title: Client drawer — notes tab
userStories.description: Threaded notes display and add note functionality.
acceptanceCriteria: Notes parsed from Notes column (format: '[INITIALS] [DATE]: [text]' separated by ' | ')
Displayed as thread: avatar initials circle, date, text — oldest first
Text input + Add Note button
New note appended to Notes column in sheet with staff initials and timestamp
Note appears in thread immediately after save
Toast confirms
npm run build passes

userStories.title: Client drawer — details tab
userStories.description: Client details grid, clinician history, and SP sync checkboxes.
acceptanceCriteria: Info grid: DOB, Employer, Primary Insurance, Member ID, Secondary Insurance, Verification Status, Staff
Clinician history section: 'Current: [name]' then prior assignments as '[date range]: [name]' reverse chronological
Clinician_History sourced from JSON column; graceful fallback if column empty
SP sync section: two checkboxes — 'SP note added' and 'Insurance updated in SP'
SP checkboxes are toggleable and write to sheet immediately
SP checkbox state stays in sync with checklist tab items 6 and 7
npm run build passes

userStories.title: Add client modal
userStories.description: Modal to create a new client row in the sheet.
acceptanceCriteria: Opens from Add Client button in top bar
Required fields: client name, clinician (dropdown from Staff tab), first appt date/time, primary insurance (text OR 'Self Pay' option)
Optional fields: DOB, member ID, employer, staff assigned
Clinician dropdown sourced from Clinician NPIs tab in sheet
On save: writes new row to 'Need to Check' tab with all provided fields
New client appears in queue immediately
Toast confirms
Modal closes after save
npm run build passes

userStories.title: Archive and reactivate workflow
userStories.description: Archive a client with reason, and reactivate archived clients.
acceptanceCriteria: Archive button in drawer header opens confirmation modal
Modal has reason dropdown: Client changed mind | Insurance issue | Incomplete paperwork — client unresponsive | Distance / location | Clinician not available | Other (free text)
On confirm: row moves to Cancellation [current year] tab, archive fields written
Client disappears from active queue
Reactivate button visible on archived rows in Historical view
Reactivation confirm modal: 'Reactivate [name]'s onboarding?'
On reactivate: row moves back to Need to Check, archive fields cleared, reactivated_date and reactivated_by written
Client reappears in active queue with previous checklist state intact
Toast confirms both actions
npm run build passes

userStories.title: Historical / completed clients view
userStories.description: Read-only view of completed and archived clients with reactivation.
acceptanceCriteria: Accessible via tab/link above the active queue
Reads from Completed [year] and Cancellation [year] tabs
Same table columns as active queue but read-only (no drawer checklist toggling)
Reactivate button shown on archived rows (opens reactivation flow from S15)
Filters: year | status (Completed / Archived) | clinician
Search by client name
npm run build passes

userStories.title: Kanban view
userStories.description: Kanban board with drag-and-drop between columns.
acceptanceCriteria: 4 columns: Paperwork | Insurance | Ready | Urgent
Column logic matches CLAUDE.md exactly
Client cards show: name (red if urgent), clinician, appt date, mini progress bar, checklist pills (Paperwork/Ins Card/Verified/SP Note — green check or red X)
@dnd-kit used for drag and drop
Dragging a card to a new column updates the underlying boolean fields to match that column's logic
Dragging to Urgent sets urgent_override = true in sheet
Dragging out of Urgent sets urgent_override = false in sheet
Column headers show count badges
Toast confirms every drag-and-drop move
npm run build passes

userStories.title: My Tasks view
userStories.description: Personalized task list with staff toggle and clinician filter.
acceptanceCriteria: Default: shows tasks for logged-in user (match by email)
Staff toggle dropdown: switch to see any other staff member's tasks
Tasks auto-generated from client data per task type rules in CLAUDE.md
Grouped by: Overdue (red) | Today (amber) | Upcoming (blue)
Count summary row at top with 3 colored numbers
Each task: description, client name (clickable — opens drawer), clinician, due date badge
Clinician filter dropdown/chip above task list
Clicking a task opens the client drawer
npm run build passes

userStories.title: Admin — Manage Staff
userStories.description: Staff management UI: view, add, and deactivate staff members.
acceptanceCriteria: Staff list table: name, initials, email, role, status (Active/Inactive)
Add Staff button opens modal: name, initials (auto-suggested from name), email, role
On add: writes new row to Staff tab, staff appears in list immediately
Deactivate button on active staff rows
Deactivation confirm modal
On deactivate: sets status = Inactive in Staff tab (row preserved)
Scans Need to Check for clients assigned to deactivated staff
Auto-creates a 'Reassign client' task in Tasks tab for each affected client
Toast: '[N] clients were assigned to [name]. Reassignment tasks created.'
npm run build passes

userStories.title: Admin — Reassign All Tasks
userStories.description: Bulk reassign all tasks from one staff member to another.
acceptanceCriteria: Two dropdowns: From (staff) → To (staff), both sourced from Staff tab
Scope selector: All tasks | Onboarding only
Preview count: 'This will reassign [N] tasks and [M] clients' before confirming
On confirm: updates assigned_to in Tasks tab + Initials in Need to Check for all matches
Audit_Log entry written
Toast confirms with count
npm run build passes

userStories.title: Admin — Automation Config
userStories.description: Config UI for all automation timing settings and outreach methods.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings form sourced from Config tab (reads key/value pairs)
Editable settings: outreach_followup_days, urgent_threshold_days, admin_default_assignee, age18_warning_days, age18_task_due_days
Each setting shows its description (from Config tab description column)
Save button writes updated values to Config tab
Outreach methods section: list of current methods with drag-to-reorder and remove buttons
Add method: text input + Add button, writes to Config outreach_methods key
Removing a method removes from Config (existing logged attempts retain their label)
npm run build passes

userStories.title: Log Outreach quick action from queue row
userStories.description: The Log Outreach icon button in the queue table opens a quick-log popover without opening the full drawer.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking Log Outreach button in queue row opens a small popover (not the full drawer)
Popover: optional context text field + method buttons (from Config)
Clicking a method button logs the attempt (same logic as outreach tab in drawer)
Popover closes after logging
Toast confirms
Sheet writes are identical to the outreach tab behavior
npm run build passes

userStories.title: Vercel deployment config and env wiring
userStories.description: Final deployment check: build passes, env vars documented, vercel.json correct.
acceptanceCriteria: npm run build produces dist/ with no errors or warnings
vercel.json routes all paths to index.html for SPA routing
.env.example has all required vars with descriptions
README.md updated with: setup instructions, env var list, how to run locally, how to deploy to Vercel
All imports resolve — no missing modules
No hardcoded Sheet IDs, client IDs, or domain names anywhere in source
npm run build passes
